description: This file defines the main application module for an Angular project, importing various Angular Material components, AWS Amplify modules, and application-specific components and services. It sets up declarations, imports, providers, and bootstrap configuration for the app.

classes.name: AppModule
classes.description: Main application module that bootstraps the Angular app, importing necessary modules and declaring components.

methods.name: NgModule
methods.description: Decorator that marks a class as an Angular module and provides configuration metadata.
